The '''''Charybdis''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]] in service to [[Viraxo Industries]]. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was escorting a convoy to [[Industrial complex]] [[VXO-33274]] when it came under attack by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], who was raiding supplies for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Vergesso Base|outpost]] in the [[Vergesso Asteroids/Legends|Vergesso Asteroids]]. Despite having a [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] escort, the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was destroyed by Ace Azzameen.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Charybdis'' is a reference to the mythological creature [[Wikipedia:Charybdis|Charybdis]]. See also [[Scylla (IPV-1 System Patrol Craft)|Scylla]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
